category_sources: source_facts.description says rust-parallel runs commands in parallel with Rust's Tokio framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official aaronriekenberg/rust-parallel repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki provides project documentation for rust-parallel.
Official repository README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/aaronriekenberg/rust-parallel, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies parallel command execution and Tokio.
source_facts.executables lists the rust-parallel CLI executable.
